description: Letter to Avraham b. Aharon ha-Kohen, with a lengthy Hebrew opening. Mentions Abū ʿAlī. It continues in the right-hand margin, where a final sentence mentioning Abū Zikrī has been added with a different pen. (Information from CUDL.)
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
